type:feature.description: Introduces new user-visible behavior or capabilities.

type:refactor.description: Restructures code without intended behavior changes.

type:chore.description: Updates maintenance, tooling, dependencies, or housekeeping.

type:test.description: Changes tests or test infrastructure only.

type:triage.description: Needs a conventional title or branch prefix before review.

area:resolver.description: Touches include, namespace, name, or autoload resolution.

area:types.description: Touches type checking, inference, or compatibility.

area:optimizer.description: Touches AST or EIR optimization passes.

area:eir.description: Touches EIR definitions, lowering, validation, or passes.

area:codegen.description: Touches target-aware assembly or backend lowering.

area:runtime.description: Touches runtime helpers, GC, ownership, or bridge runtimes.

area:builtins.description: Touches PHP builtin declarations or emitters.

area:web.description: Touches --web mode, its prelude, or elephc-web.

area:magician.description: Touches eval, include execution, or elephc-magician.

area:platform.description: Touches targets, object formats, linking, or platform support.

area:tooling-ci.description: Touches CI, development tooling, Docker, or repository scripts.

area:triage.description: No primary component could be inferred from changed paths.

target:linux-x86_64.description: Contains behavior specific to the Linux x86_64 target.

target:linux-aarch64.description: Contains behavior specific to the Linux AArch64 target.

target:macos-aarch64.description: Contains behavior specific to the macOS AArch64 target.

target:windows-x86_64.description: Contains behavior specific to the Windows x86_64 target.

target:wasm32-wasi.description: Contains behavior specific to the wasm32-wasi target.

size:xl.description: Very large pull request that needs deliberate review planning.

scope:multi-area.description: Touches more compiler areas than the automatic area-label cap.

topic:php-compat.description: Changes PHP compatibility or observable PHP semantics.

topic:ownership-gc.description: Changes ownership, refcounting, cleanup, COW, or GC behavior.

topic:performance.description: Primarily concerns performance, latency, or resource usage.

topic:abi.description: Changes calling conventions, registers, frames, or binary ABI behavior.

topic:arrays.description: Concerns PHP arrays, hashes, indexing, or array operations.

topic:strings.description: Concerns strings, encodings, offsets, or string operations.

topic:closures.description: Concerns closures, callables, or anonymous functions.

topic:fibers.description: Concerns PHP Fibers or cooperative coroutines.

topic:regex.description: Concerns regular expressions or preg_* behavior.

topic:control-flow.description: Concerns branching, loops, match, switch, or exceptions.

topic:numeric-literals.description: Concerns integer or floating-point literal handling.

topic:errors.description: Concerns diagnostics, exceptions, or PHP Error classes.
